message:
fix: resolve clippy errors across ext_tiered_corpus, conformance, license, and provider_streaming

- ext_tiered_corpus.rs: unnested or-patterns, map_unwrap_or→map_or, branches_sharing_code,
  match_same_arms, unnecessary_wraps (infer_runtime returns String not Option<String>)
- conformance.rs: manual_string_new ("".into() → String::new()), redundant_clone
- extension_license.rs: doc_markdown backticks, needless_raw_string_hashes
- ext_license_screen.rs: doc_markdown backticks
- openai_responses.rs: doc_markdown (OpenAI → `OpenAI`)
- extension_tiered_corpus.rs: manual_range_contains
- Removed obsolete tui_repro.rs bug-reproduction test (bug already fixed in src/tui.rs)
- Synced concurrent agent changes (agent_cx, extension_inclusion, risk review, provenance)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
